title: Coca-Cola Uses AI to Rekindle the Magic of Its Holiday Ads
text:
SUBSCRIPTION ONLY
Holidays
Coca-Cola Uses AI to Rekindle the Magic of Its Holiday Ads
'Refresh Your Holidays' merges human creativity and machine artistry.
By
Matt Barker
The future of brands gets decided here. Join the industry’s top marketers at Brandweek for the ideas, insights, and connections shaping what’s next.
Get your ticket.
Coca-Cola is ringing in the holidays with a refreshed take on one of advertising’s most enduring seasonal traditions.
Launching today, “Refresh Your Holidays” is the latest campaign from WPP Open X, led by VML and supported by EssenceMediacom, Ogilvy, and Burson. The new work blends AI and human craft to reimagine Coca-Cola’s “The Holidays Are Coming” formula that has defined the brand’s festive marketing for more than 30 years.
This time, a convoy of light-wrapped red trucks once again cuts through a snowy landscape, sparking joy among animals and people alike. Polar and panda bears share the frame, while that familiar choral soundtrack swells toward its signature Christmas crescendo.
Matt Barker
Matt Barker is a contributing writer for ADWEEK. He has previously written for Campaign, Marketing Week, and Condé Nast.
